anchor_reconcile.note: 252.69 is the true surgical-path served number; lawine's 252.31 derived anchor is accurate (+0.38, <1 sigma_hw); fern's 253.78 is a fast-stack proxy (-1.09, <1 sigma_hw). Both reconcile within noise.

lawine544_projection.byte_exact_risk_caveat: int4 head perturbs logits -> may flip greedy near-ties (byte-exactness NOT guaranteed); fp8 lower-risk; this ceiling is an UPPER bound

ceiling_reconcile.verdict: LEVER CONFIRMED + OVER-REALIZES: low anchor end within 1 sigma_hw, but realized ceiling 299.29 is +7.19 TPS (+1.48 sigma_hw) above lawine's 292.1, outside the sigma_hw band -> ceiling CORRECTS UPWARD to 299.29. Likely cause: lawine's static weight-read model fixes E[T]/acceptance and prices only the dense-weight-read delta (1.996 ms); the live MTP spec-decode serve realizes a larger per-step wall saving from the int4 Marlin GEMV. Split NOT re-derived (per PR).

identity_detail.interpretation: int4 head is NOT byte-exact greedy-identical (fails #319 strict gate). Headline uses free-run censored hazard (0.763%) because the teacher-forced readout has a 0.433% bf16-on-bf16 self-check floor (spec-decode/numeric path mismatch, tf_selfcheck_clean=False). int4-attributable teacher-forced excess = 0.690%, consistent with the 0.763% free-run hazard. Both arms are run-to-run non-deterministic (self_det_bf16=0.344), so 0.763% is an UPPER bound on int4-attributable divergence. CONFIRMS lawine #544's int4_head_byte_exact_risk caveat empirically.

floor_invariant_proof: serve.py patch_min_tokens_floor_sources() (L1051-1068) patches ONLY chat_completion/protocol.py ChatCompletionRequest.to_sampling_params; /v1/completions (CompletionRequest.to_sampling_params) is untouched. All TPS/PPL/identity measurements use /v1/completions -> min_tokens floor (#545) is a no-op on every metric here, BY CONSTRUCTION.
structural_verdict: NO-FIRE. (1) The plain int4 full head over-realizes lawine #544's +38 speed (realized +46.6, 1.217x; served 299.29 local / ~309.8 official) -> lawine's +38 SPEED is real and then-some on a served path. (2) BUT a plain precision-dropped head BREAKS #319 byte-exact identity (this card: served greedy flips 0.76% free-run / ~0.69-1.12% int4-attributable; fern #549 offline 2.12%) -> 299.29 is the realized SPEED CEILING, not a strict-shippable number. (3) The identity-safe realization of the same +38 is fern #549 candidate-verify (K_safe=8, identity 1.0), which this card names but does not build. (4) Even the speed ceiling 299.29 local / ~309.8 official is far below the 442 unsafe-frontier and 500 official gate. No ship, no submission.

public_evidence.note: Citations are reconciliation targets supplied in the PR #553 body; not independent inspection of other students' branches.

precision_head_role: REALIZED SPEED CEILING / upper-bound on the head lever -- NOT a strict-shippable number. A plain int4 full head realizes lawine's +38 speed (over-realizes, 1.217x) but breaks #319 byte-exact identity (greedy flips ~1-2%). The identity-SAFE realization of the same +38 is fern #549's candidate-verify (K_safe=8), which this card does NOT build.

fern549_reconcile.agreement: CONFIRMS fern #549 on a SERVED decode path (not just offline): the plain int4 full head IS identity-breaking, flipping the greedy token at the ~1% level. This card's served int4-attributable rate (0.69%-1.12%) is somewhat BELOW fern's clean offline 2.12%, attributable to (a) free-run censored-hazard undercounting (stops at first divergence; both arms non-deterministic, self_det_bf16=0.344, so the reference itself moves), (b) a 0.43% spec-decode teacher-force readout floor (prompt_logprobs rank-1 vs actual generated token) that blurs the served count, and (c) a smaller/different held-out stream (16,384 vs 60,000). fern's offline 2.12% is the authoritative per-position rate; this card confirms the EFFECT is real on the actual served path. Direction + order-of-magnitude match -> plain int4 head FAILS #319.
fern549_reconcile.identity_safe_path: fern #549 candidate-verify K_safe=8: cheap int4 nominator top-8 -> exact fp verify of those 8 rows -> re-argmax => identity 1.0 AND captures the +38 speed. Heavier kernel lift (fern's local experimental decode path); NOT built in this card.
